name: The Offering Endures

keyword_abilities.granted_to: Friendly Savage models of Sz 3 or greater

abilities.name: Giant's Skin
abilities.text: Once per activation. Reduce damage from an enemy (missile) or (magic) action by 1.

abilities.name: Cold Comes Walking
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may drain a (c) to give a model engaging it a Numb token.

actions.name: Ancient Winds
actions.effects: Move the target up to 5". If this action receives a raise, the target gains a Frozen Solid token.

actions.name: Hepatomancy
actions.effects: Target an enemy Remains marker. The opposing player tells you the name of their currently selected scheme.

extraction_notes: Ancient Winds has a triple-icon Signature marker (three diamonds)
Hepatomancy has a triple-icon Signature marker (three diamonds)
Giant's Skin and Cold Comes Walking are granted to models of Sz 3 or greater
Ancient Winds and Hepatomancy are granted to all Friendly Savage models
